reviews.comment:
Pasamos varias veces x el lugar siempre que fui está limpio y los baños igual.... da gusto pasar cada vez que pueda!!!

(Translated by Google)
We've passed by this place several times; every time I've been, it's clean, and the bathrooms are great too... it's a pleasure to stop by whenever I can!
